title: senecio hispidulus
intro: Senecio hispidulus, also known as Rough Groundsel, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is rich in sesquiterpene lactones, which have been found to possess antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Senecio hispidulus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural remedies for various health concerns.
